errors.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

duplicate.modalTitle: Already signed in on another device
duplicate.fallbackBody: You are already signed in elsewhere. End the existing session and sign in here?
duplicate.retryFailedFallback: Re-login failed. Please try again later.

expoGo.title: Opened in Expo Go
expoGo.body: Kakao / Naver are native modules and are unavailable in Expo Go. Launch the MindGarden app installed on your simulator/phone, or run `npx expo run:ios` and use that app. Email login still works.
